body: We need this to identify the performance issues (#2910), and find out why nsight systems is sometimes breaking (#2911).
title: Add nsys reports back to CI

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `DiffEqCallbacks` package from `2` to `2, 3`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for DiffEqCallbacks to 3, (keep existing compat)
